intro_only_event_multi_paldea_cutin_8040: Oh great... You’re here too, Mr. Hassel?

Now that I’m away from the academy,
I was hoping I could chill and slack off.

As long as you spend your days in a way
you do not regret later on, I won’t say a
thing.

How kind of you, Mr. Hassel! I guess I’ll be
on my way, then!

However, your grandfather Drayden asked
me to check on you.

So as long as this old dragon’s still got life
in him, it’s my duty as a teacher to give
guidance!

*sigh*
Mr. Hassel, please just give it a rest already.

Wow! You have a sygna suit that matches
Furret!

It looks good on you, Kieran! And Furret,
you’re...you’re just TOO CUTE!
Ehehe... Thanks.

I didn’t give Furret much chance to shine at
Blueberry Academy...

so we’re gonna be best buds and work hard
here on Pasio to make up for it!

Being best buds and working hard together...
Yes, I think that would be a fine idea!
Yo, ex-Champ. Doin’ anything fun today?
Aw man... Whatever, Drayton...
Bein’ a jerk again today, Mr. ex-ex-Champ?
That’s me, the ex-ex-Champ!

If you don’t give it a rest, I’m not giving
you my class notes from Pasio Academy
anymore.
Same here!
Gwuh?! Wait a sec, guys...

Do you have any idea what my grandpa
will say if he finds out I’m slacking off on
Pasio, too?!
